approved_indication: PrednisTab (oral tablet, dogs): for use as an anti-inflammatory agent. Solu-Delta Cortef (prednisolone sodium succinate, IV/IM, dogs and cats): inflammatory, allergic and less severe stress conditions, and shock in dogs.
note: Multiple approved prednisolone products exist; the plain oral tablet (PrednisTab) is dog-only, while prednisolone salt/ester products (Solu-Delta Cortef, Meticortelone Acetate NADA 010-312) are approved for both dogs and cats.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Control of atopic dermatitis in dogs at least 4 lbs (Atopica); control of feline allergic dermatitis in cats at least 6 months and 3 lbs (Atopica for Cats). Optimmune (NADA 141-052) is approved for keratoconjunctivitis sicca in dogs.
note: Well-established approval; generics also approved (Sporimune ANADA 200-627, Cyclavance ANADA 200-692, Modulis ANADA 200-743/200-744).
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Prednisone sterile aqueous suspension (intramuscular): for conditions requiring an anti-inflammatory agent, in dogs and cats (also approved in horses).
note: Green Book lists Meticorten (Intervet) as an approved, non-withdrawn injectable suspension for dogs/cats/horses; note the approval is the injectable, whereas the oral prednisone tablets vets typically dispense are human-label products used extra-label.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Treatment of dermatophytosis caused by Microsporum canis in cats.
note: Approved for cats only (Virbac oral solution); use in dogs (e.g. for aspergillosis/blastomycosis) is extra-label.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Treatment of canine separation anxiety in conjunction with a behavior modification plan
note: Label states verbatim 'Approved by FDA under NADA #141-272'; chewable tablets for dogs.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Management of ventricular hypertrophy in cats with subclinical hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM)
note: CONDITIONALLY approved (Mar 2025) 'pending a full demonstration of effectiveness' under application number 141-604 - cats only, unrelated to the queried osteosarcoma use, which remains extra-label in dogs.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Control of systemic hypertension in cats
note: FDA FOI summary confirms NADA 141-613, approved April 29 2026, sponsor Ceva Sante Animale; first veterinary amlodipine product. Use in dogs remains extra-label.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Control of systemic hypertension in cats
note: FDA FOI summary confirms NADA 141-501, approved May 15 2018, sponsor Boehringer Ingelheim Vetmedica; a separate earlier approval covers feline CKD proteinuria in some markets.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Dogs: control of pain and inflammation associated with osteoarthritis. Cats: control of postoperative pain and inflammation associated with orthopedic surgery, ovariohysterectomy and castration (single one-time subcutaneous dose only).
note: Verified on the FDA-approved Metacam injection label (NADA 141-219, dogs and cats); Metacam Oral Suspension is a separate approval (NADA 141-213, dogs) and multiple generics (ANADA 200-xxx) exist.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Treatment of Giardia duodenalis infection in dogs.
note: Approval is for Giardia in dogs only (verified on label); the GI/colitis-IBD use implied by the pet label is still extra-label, and there is no cat approval.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

note: Label states 'Approved by FDA under NADA # 141-292', for oral use in cats only (Dechra); a generic (ANADA 200-814) and Felanorm oral solution also exist.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Treatment of separation anxiety in dogs over 6 months, as part of a comprehensive behavioral management program
note: Confirmed via FDA FOI Summary for Clomicalm Tablets, NADA 141-120, dogs; a generic clomipramine has since been approved.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Anti-inflammatory corticosteroid for corticosteroid-responsive collagen, dermal, allergic, ocular, otic and musculoskeletal conditions in dogs and cats
note: Label states 'Approved by FDA under NADA # 011-403', 'For Oral Use in Dogs and Cats' (Zoetis); note the approval is a general anti-inflammatory indication, NOT specifically autoimmune hemolytic anemia, which remains extra-label.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: Control of seizures associated with idiopathic epilepsy in dogs
note: CONDITIONAL approval (CNADA, Genus Lifesciences), not a full NADA; status Approved in the Green Book, dogs only - historically phenobarbital was used extra-label from human products.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: With concurrent therapy (e.g. furosemide) for management of clinical signs of mild, moderate or severe congestive heart failure in dogs due to atrioventricular valvular insufficiency (AVVI)
note: Approved only as the fixed-combination product Cardalis (Ceva) for dogs; no spironolactone-only animal product is approved.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

animal_trade_name: Salix Tablets (also Salix Injection, Disal, generic furosemide tablets/syrup)
approved_indication: For treatment of edema (pulmonary congestion, ascites) associated with cardiac insufficiency and acute noninflammatory tissue edema
note: Multiple approved products for dogs and cats: Salix Tablets NADA 034-621, Salix Injection NADA 034-478, Disal NADA 129-034, generics ANADA 200-293 / 200-759.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

approved_indication: With concurrent therapy (e.g. furosemide) for management of clinical signs of mild, moderate or severe congestive heart failure in dogs due to atrioventricular valvular insufficiency (AVVI)
note: Approved in the US only within the combination product Cardalis for dogs; benazepril-only vet products (e.g. Fortekor) are not US-approved.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥

animal_trade_name: Tribrissen 30/120/480/960 Tablets (also Di-Trim Tablets, NADA 115-578; Tribrissen 60 Oral Suspension, NADA 136-741)
approved_indication: Systemic antibacterial action against sensitive organisms in dogs, including acute urinary tract infections, acute bacterial complications of distemper, acute respiratory tract infections, acute alimentary tract infections, wound infections and abscesses
note: Approved only as the fixed sulfadiazine+trimethoprim combination (not trimethoprim alone); FDA record shows species Dogs, status Approved, Rx, no withdrawal — note the approval is for bacterial infections, NOT for Pneumocystis pneumonia, which would be extra-label.
regulatory_status: FDA 核准動物用藥
